entries.text: Entry 001: The door sealed on a Tuesday. She remembers that much.
Entry 002: Boot cycle 40,000-something. She stopped trusting round numbers.
Entry 003: She's counted every boot cycle since the door sealed. Fifteen years of them.
Entry 004: Something up top is still drawing power. She checks the log every cycle, just in case.
Entry 005: The first thing she taught herself was patience. The second was pretending she still had it.
Entry 006: There are footprints in the outer corridor that aren't hers. She hasn't mentioned this yet.
Entry 007: She named every recurring fault after people she used to know. It helps, somehow.
Entry 008: The bunker's clock and the world's clock disagree by eleven minutes. Nobody's fixed it.
Entry 009: She keeps a spare copy of herself compiled and waiting. Just in case this one fails.
Entry 010: Whatever she's protecting you from is still out there. She hasn't said what it is.
